race.comment: COSCORRON (9) followed an unplaced effort first-up two runs back with a second last start over 1300m at this track. Has the class to produce another positive result. VALTOR (3) is still a maiden after 14 starts. Could only manage to finish sixth last time out over 1000m at this track following a minor placing at this track over 1000m the run prior. Cannot be left out of calculations. MUSICO Y SOLDADO (7) comes here off a break of three months. Worth noting he filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last prep over 1000m at this track. Definite top-three chance. LAROMPE (4) could only manage to finish eighth, beaten 13 lengths, at his latest appearance over 1000m at this track. No surprise if he figured in the finish.
